final:
module top_module(
    input wire [3:0] min_in,
    input wire [3:0] comb_circuit_out,
    output reg [3:0] max_out
);// Comparator functional module
    always @(*) begin
        if (min_in > comb_circuit_out) begin
            max_out = min_in;
        end else begin
            max_out = comb_circuit_out;
        end
    end

endmodule
